props.title: Why Choose Our Platform
props.body: Streamline your workflow with enterprise-grade campaign tools. Collaborate seamlessly, publish instantly, and measure impact in real time.

items.q: How do I set up my first campaign?
items.a: Simply connect your content sources, define your audience, and set your launch date. Our onboarding wizard guides you through every step.

items.q: Can I collaborate with my team?
items.a: Yes. Invite team members, assign roles, and manage permissions. Real-time collaboration keeps everyone in sync.
Track engagement, reach, conversions, and ROI across channels. Detailed reports and dashboards give you actionable insights.

props.title: Ready to Transform Your Content Strategy?
props.description: Join hundreds of companies using Strapi to power their campaigns.

props.heading: Transform Your Vision into Reality
props.subheading: Unlock powerful insights and accelerate your workflow with intuitive tools designed for modern teams.
